title: ilex trichocarpa
intro: Ilex trichocarpa, also known as the Pacific holly or mountain holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The leaves and berries of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Ilex trichocarpa is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The leaves and berries can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are also used in herbal supplements and topical applications.
